baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: GMI amplified ×3 at T3. Geologist CEO raises to ×4. Your own ENERGY assets are immune to negative GMI this year. (Previously party-wide — scoped to owner only.)

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: Your own ENERGY assets are immune to negative GMI this year. (Previously party-wide — scoped to owner only.)
−1 stress in any year GMI is positive.

flavourText: The sun doesn't send invoices. The sovereign does.
